Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. QGIS 4.0 48 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Querying 3B Vectors 48 upvotes, 6 comments
  3. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 129 upvotes, 24 comments
  4. Galileo's handwritten notes found in ancient astronomy text 133 upvotes, 25 comments
  5. CT Scans of Health Wearables 218 upvotes, 47 comments
  6. The Longing (1999) 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 569 upvotes, 154 comments
  8. Sarvam 105B, the first competitive Indian open source LLM 46 upvotes, 7 comments
  9. Plasma Bigscreen – 10-foot interface for KDE plasma 432 upvotes, 125 comments
  10. this css proves me human 268 upvotes, 88 comments
  11. Editing changes in patch format with Jujutsu 27 upvotes, 5 comments
  12. Helix: A post-modern text editor 148 upvotes, 57 comments
  13. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 169 upvotes, 78 comments
  14. Lock Scroll with a Vengeance 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  15. Working and Communicating with Japanese Engineers 28 upvotes, 8 comments
  16. Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs 559 upvotes, 314 comments
  17. Show HN: 1v1 coding game that LLMs struggle with 22 upvotes, 6 comments
  18. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 257 upvotes, 140 comments
  19. UUID package coming to Go standard library 196 upvotes, 109 comments
  20. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 889 upvotes, 591 comments
  21. Show HN: Kula – Lightweight, self-contained Linux server monitoring tool 56 upvotes, 28 comments
  22. Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion 441 upvotes, 311 comments
  23. Maybe there's a pattern here? 126 upvotes, 78 comments
  24. What canceled my Go context? 61 upvotes, 35 comments
  25. Uploading Pirated Books via BitTorrent Qualifies as Fair Use, Meta Argues 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. LLMs work best when the user defines their acceptance criteria first 230 upvotes, 178 comments
  27. C# strings silently kill your SQL Server indexes in Dapper 101 upvotes, 73 comments
  28. Modernizing swapping: virtual swap spaces 27 upvotes, 17 comments
  29. My application programmer instincts failed when debugging assembler 10 upvotes, 8 comments
  30. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 52 upvotes, 76 comments

Last generated 6:30pm, 7 March 2026. Source here.
